name: coleus forskohlii
title: coleus forskohlii benefits
description: Coleus forskohlii reduces blood pressure by decreasing the force of the heart's contractions and dilating blood vessels, resulting in lower systolic and diastolic blood pressure readings. This benefit is crucial as high blood pressure is a major risk factor for cardiovascular diseases, such as heart failure, stroke, and kidney disease, which can lead to disability and even death if left unmanaged.
